title: HP 14a-ne1500sa 14" Chromebook - Intel® Celeron®, 64 GB eMMC, Grey
overview:
Just because ChromeOS keeps things simple doesn't mean you have to make compromises. The OS is so streamlined that the dual-core Intel® Pentium® 4500 processor and 4 GB of RAM will be plenty for most workflows. All your must-have tools like Word and Excel are right here as apps too. And whether you're using it for work or play, the HD screen will keep things clear.

Good to know

- For connecting to monitors, you've got options – use the DisplayPort or the USB Type-C ports
- With Wi-Fi 6 and Bluetooth 5.4, staying connected has never been smoother
- Google's H1 security chip is just one of the reasons why Chromebooks are so resistant to viruses
- This Chromebook only weighs 1.52 kg, so it's ready to accompany you on your travels
- Up to 8 hours of battery means less time scrambling for outlets, more time getting stuff done
- Let your friends, family or colleagues see and hear you clearly on this HD webcam with dual mics

And because it's got a 360° hinge, you can also use it in tent mode - perfect for watching films without the keyboard in the way. It's compact too. At just 1.56 kg, you'll barely feel it in your backpack. And with 14 hours of battery life, you can leave the charger at home.

To keep you productive, all your must-have tools like Word and Excel are on hand as ChromeOS apps. And because ChromeOS is super streamlined, the eight-core processor and 8 GB of DDR5 RAM will fly through most workflows. After a job well done, fold your x360 and it's a tablet. So you can treat yourself to a streaming binge on the Full HD touchscreen.

Good to know

- WiFi 6 means you can expect fast, lag-free internet so it's great for streaming or video calls
- With up to 10 hours of battery life you won't have to scramble for the power socket
- Friends and family will see you clearly on the Full HD webcam
- Google's H1 security chip is just one of the reasons why Chromebooks are so resistant to viruses

title: LENOVO Chromebook Plus 14" - MediaTek Kompanio Ultra 910, 256 GB UFS, Grey
overview:
The Lenovo Chromebook Plus is the perfect productivity sidekick. It's fueled by the MediaTek Kompanio Ultra chip, which is packed with power and AI. Google's Gemini will help you breeze through tasks, whether you're writing, organizing, or creating. And when it's time to kick back, the 14" OLED display and Dolby Atmos audio give your movies stunning visuals and immersive sound. Plus, it lasts up to 17 hours on a single charge – that's two full working days and then some.

Good to know

- The aluminium body makes the Chromebook Plus sturdy and lightweight, at just 1.17 kg
- Friends and colleagues will see you clearly on the 5 MP webcam - for everyone else, there's a privacy shutter
- Don't worry about hoarding browser tabs – with 16 GB of DDR5 RAM, it won't slow you down
- With WiFi 7, you can download, upload and stream at lightning-fast speeds
- To keep your files secure, it's got a built-in fingerprint scanner
- Chromebooks are less likely to get viruses, and they come with Google's H1 Security Chip

title: ASUS CX34 14" Chromebook Plus - Intel® Core™ i5, 512 GB SSD, Grey
overview:
With the Chromebook Plus CX34 in your bag, you can make anywhere your office. Weighing at just 1.43 kg it's easy to carry around, and the roomy 14" Full HD screen gives you plenty of real estate for apps, browsing or movies. For sharing ideas around the conference table, the 180° hinge lets you lay the screen totally flat, so everyone can see.

Good to know

- ChromeOS is safe and easy to use and can run all your favourite Android apps
- Friends and family will see you clearly on the Full HD webcam 
- If you like to work by the window, you'll appreciate the anti-glare display
- You can get through a full day's work without your charger thanks to the 10 hours of battery life
- The Intel® Core™ i5 processor is perfect for everyday browsing, emailing and social networking
- 512 SSD of SSD storage gives you plenty of space for the important files and projects

title: ACER Spin 714 14" 2 in 1 Chromebook Plus - Intel® Core™ Ultra 5, 512 GB SSD, Grey
overview:
Get stuff done with the Acer Spin 714. Its 14" Full HD IPS touchscreen provides amazing colours and wide viewing angles. Great both for work and for catching up on Netflix. The Intel® Core™ Ultra 5 processor packs all the power you need for your most-used apps. It can run for up to 10 hours on a single charge, so you can leave the charging brick at home. And at just 1.45 kg, it won't weigh you down either.

Good to know

- ChromeOS is easy and safe to use and can run all your favourite apps from Google Play Store
- Browse, stream and download faster than ever before thanks to WiFi 6E
- Starting up your laptop and multitasking will be superquick with the 512 GB SSD and 8 GB RAM
- The Quad HD webcam will make you look awesome on work calls and catchups with friends
- With two Thunderbolt 4 ports, a USB 3.2 ports, and an HDMI 2.0 , you'll have plenty of ways to hook up accessories
- It's passed the MIL-STD 810H durability test, so you can be sure it'll survive everyday knocks and bumps
